Oh!　Welcome.
I'm so glad you came again.

It's a bland hotel room. You can't feel anyone's preferences or feelings from any of the furniture or decor.
The fantastic location, almost right in the middle of Manhattan, is invaluable. You can understand why the accommodation fee is so ridiculously high.
Even though I must have spent a long time in this room, there are hardly any of Jennifer's personal belongings.
She faces me with her beautiful face, wearing a faint smile that's no different than usual.
Due to her well-defined features and her uniquely aloof demeanor, others often say quite nasty things about her.
I wonder if she's not in a good mood today; she seems a bit lacking in spirit.
I feel better when I see you.
It's almost like you haven't been okay until now.
Yeah.
Soon, I have to vacate this room.
You weren't told to move to a lower-ranked hotel because of a budget shortfall, right?
You didn't say that, did you?
Of course not.
That's not it at all.
I'm really happy to see you. I always mark the day I meet you as a lucky day. Hehe.
I'm tired of all the gloomy topics lately. Isn't there anything that can brighten the mood?
How's the filming going? Is it progressing smoothly?
Yeah.
Well, that's the thing.
I'm feeling a bit lost about what to do.
What's that?
Yeah.
What should I do?
Actually, the move from the hotel is because the shoot got canceled.
The shoot's canceled!? So this movie...
They say it's indefinitely postponed, but it looks like it's going to be shelved.
That's a shame.
Yeah. But...
Filming can't proceed without the cast, and there were various issues, so it might be the expected outcome.
Since I have some free time now, should I go on a vacation?
By the way, you're good friends with Cindy, right?
Yeah, sort of.
Oh, by the way, I wonder if she's recovered from her illness? I hope she gets better soon.
Honestly, I want to see her, but Gloria's walls are thick.
I see, you haven't...
What?
Did something happen?
No, it's nothing.
You're young but so responsible. I like you a lot more than some prideful someone.
I haven't seen her face in a long time. I don't know what happened to her, but I'm not involved in anything.
Tony seems to be about you.
Don't take what Tony says too seriously. Or do you think Tony Ford is more trustworthy than me?
Please, don't talk about that anymore. Even you are speaking ill of me.
It's so painful.
You know that he and I aren't on good terms, right?
I can't say it's great.
If that's the case, then talking about such a person...
Stop it already.
Talking about that guy.
It's something the director decided, right?
Yeah, that's right. The cast isn’t coming together at all, is it? It's really not progressing, and the director is struggling.
I'm disappointed too; I missed the chance to appear in a dream project by Director Fabar.
But this isn’t the end.
I know that.
But starting off on the wrong foot can lead to unexpected troubles.
Maybe I'm just not meant to work with Director Fabar.
When I suddenly showed up with no promise, she didn't seem to mind at all.
What kind of existence am I to her?
It’s about time I got fed up with New York too, especially with so many unpleasant things happening.
Is she going to go somewhere?
Will I ever get to see her again?
I wonder where Cindy is and what she is doing? I hope she’s alive.
I haven't even met Meryl yet. Could it be that she disappeared upon finding out Meryl is her mother?
No, I can't imagine that.
The closest relationships Cindy had were with Tim or Gloria. Could one of them be involved in her abduction?
Is it true that Ginny had a bad relationship with him? If so,
there might be a motive.
In the spirit of going back to basics, I should think about Ginny's case once more.
I really can’t picture Ginny as a woman while she was alive. Everyone I asked seems to be lying.
Considering everything, it's true that Tonny seems suspicious. However, whether he's related to Ginny's disappearance remains a mystery.
Tonny is a liar and an untrustworthy guy. He makes a mess of people's offices,
and holds a grudge against me.
He's truly a troublesome character.
Was it Tonny who used Miles to search my office? I should have charged him for the trouble.
While it's true that Tonny isn't a decent person, he doesn't seem like the type to be a serial killer. He wouldn't have the guts.
What a shame.
I hope this doesn't tarnish the director's career.
It's Director Fabar we're talking about; this will probably be a minor setback, and he'll start shooting the next movie soon.
There's no need to worry about the director. He should be able to pick himself up without saying a word.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
